prompt: Please transform this illustration into a fantastical Raden lacquerware style. Inlay countless thin flakes of mother-of-pearl onto a deep jet-black background, maximizing the iridescent play-of-color that shines strongly depending on the light angle. Emphasize the beautiful shell reflections and shifting colors particularly in the highlights of the character's eyes and hair. However, keep the Raden subtle on the face and skin to maintain a natural and beautiful appearance. Create a mysterious, dreamlike, noble, and elegant atmosphere like a treasure. Achieve a breathtaking beauty that combines delicate craftsmanship and luxury. Completely maintain the original composition and character.
